org.apache.dubbo.common.logger

类 LoggerFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.common.logger.LoggerFactory

  • public class LoggerFactory
extends Object
    Logger factory

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 静态方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static File getFile()
      Get the current logging file
      static Level getLevel()
      Get logging level
      static Logger getLogger(Class<?> key)
      Get logger provider
      static Logger getLogger(String key)
      Get logger provider
      static void setLevel(Level level)
      Set the current logging level
      static void setLoggerAdapter(LoggerAdapter loggerAdapter)
      Set logger provider
      static void setLoggerAdapter(String loggerAdapter) 

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 方法详细资料

      • setLoggerAdapter

        public static void setLoggerAdapter(String loggerAdapter)

      • setLoggerAdapter

        public static void setLoggerAdapter(LoggerAdapter loggerAdapter)
        Set logger provider
        参数:
        loggerAdapter - logger provider

      • getLogger

        public static Logger getLogger(Class<?> key)
        Get logger provider
        参数:
        key - the returned logger will be named after clazz
        返回:
        logger

      • getLogger

        public static Logger getLogger(String key)
        Get logger provider
        参数:
        key - the returned logger will be named after key
        返回:
        logger provider

      • getLevel

        public static Level getLevel()
        Get logging level
        返回:
        logging level

      • setLevel

        public static void setLevel(Level level)
        Set the current logging level
        参数:
        level - logging level

      • getFile

        public static File getFile()
        Get the current logging file
        返回:
        current logging file
